title: Luffy Shares His True Dream
description: On pages 11–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Sabo, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Nami, Chopper as Luffy reveals his true dream to the crew while world events around Sabo, Lulusia, and the Government signal a dangerous new stage.
scene: Luffy reveals his true dream to the crew while world events around Sabo, Lulusia, and the Government signal a dangerous new stage.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When Navy Ho gets Word of this treason, you'll all be impaled!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Make sure they leave a few for me, papa!! I'll never forgive these dirty plebs!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your majesty... no I mean... Lord sexi... please just confess to your crimes. We don't want to kill you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It happened in the throne room at Panga Castle...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Cut the signal to the surveillance division's transgender snails!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I thought that there was no king of the world,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But the empty throne wasn't empty!! I saw....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As far as the surveillance division is concerned...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What is up there? A shadow...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: No one detected anything abnormal today

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We have reports of seaguakes off the southeastern shore.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A FEW DAYS LATER -- ABOARD THE THOUSAND SUNY

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Furl the sails!! The wind is too strong!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Are we close to making land, Nami?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: BRR!! It feels like we've entered an island's climate zone!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I guess the next one's a winter island!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Oh? Aren't you looking dashing, chopper?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hehe!! verily!! Tama gave me this hat to shield me from the snow!!

summary: This part advances the New Era After Wano through 44 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
